descriptionParagraphs: The Disco II from SHARPEYE Surfboards delivers the world's fastest surfboard with entry-level All-Round Performance.

The Disco II is an entry-level performance shortboard. The Disco II is an updated version of the original Disco Model with some tweaks to provide added speed and flow in everyday conditions. The Disco II features a full entry rocker that seamlessly flows into a flattened exit, combined with a reliable, controlled medium rail. The bottom contour features a medium single concave that flows into a deep double between the fins, eventually blending into a flat exit that provides an instant burst of speed from take-off and delivers maximum speed generation whilst maintaining manoeuvrability and drive.
The Disco II model provides entry-level All-Round Performance in smaller conditions.

The E3-Lite epoxy glassing technology has been developed with leading composite material firms to develop custom carbon/Innegra tapes to produce incredible results with unmatched performance. E3 Epoxy tech features a super tight cell structured core, a stringer-less EPS blank, and a 4oz layer of fiberglass on the bottom combined with a custom Innegra/carbon tape. The deck is layered with SharpEye's custom triple carbon tape with a layer of Bi-axle 4oz cloth. SharpEye's commitment to innovation and constant improvement has paid off with the E3 Lite technology. Zero Compromise.
